Forge is treating this as a [react] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<think>
I need to create a full-stack restaurant management application with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and NextAuth.

Plan:
1. Initialize the project structure and create all 24 files as requested.
2. Use `task_tracker` to manage the creation of these files in batches.
3. Create the files using `str_replace_editor` with the `create` command.
4. Ensure all files have the necessary content, imports, and types.

Files to create:
1. package.json
2. tsconfig.json
3. next.config.js
4. prisma/schema.prisma
5. src/app/layout.tsx
6. src/app/page.tsx
7. src/app/globals.css
8. src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
9. src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
10. src/app/api/menu/route.ts
11. src/app/api/orders/route.ts
12. src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
13. src/app/menu/page.tsx
14. src/app/orders/page.tsx
15. src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
16. src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
17. src/lib/prisma.ts
18. src/lib/auth.ts
19. src/components/Navbar.tsx
20. src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
21. src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
22. src/components/OrderTable.tsx
23. src/middleware.ts
24. .env.example

I will start by initializing the task tracker.
</think>

task_list.description: Create project configuration files (package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.js, prisma/schema.prisma)
Create core app files (src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/page.tsx, src/app/globals.css, src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts)
Create API route files (src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts, src/app/api/menu/route.ts, src/app/api/orders/route.ts, src/app/dashboard/page.tsx)
Create page files (src/app/menu/page.tsx, src/app/orders/page.tsx, src/app/auth/login/page.tsx, src/app/auth/register/page.tsx)

Create utility and component files (src/lib/prisma.ts, src/lib/auth.ts, src/components/Navbar.tsx, src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx, src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx, src/components/OrderTable.tsx, src/middleware.ts, .env.example)
